title: polypodium carnosum
intro: Polypodium carnosum, also known as the common polypody or polypody fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Polypodium carnosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and support the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Polypodium carnosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
